spec_match.rationale: Rigorous feature checking of both totalFrames and discardedFrames inside MediaStreamTrackProcessor prototypes before triggering live pipeline instances.

interactive.rationale: Excellent interactive environment. Incorporates custom support banners, interactive delay knobs, large monospace readout panels, and a dynamic console logger updating every second.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfect fit to the core API properties description.

edge_cases.rationale: Implements a robust simulation fallback engine mapping mathematical drop possibilities to random offsets when counters are unsupported.

references.rationale: Missing the mandatory reference link to the chromestatus.com/feature/6267249280286720 entry.

design_system.rationale: Conforms seamlessly to standard metrics boards, system-styled table listings, and bordered inputs.

openQuestions.title: Add missing chromestatus.com reference link
openQuestions.detail: Every concept page must include a link to the associated ChromeStatus entry. Add a link to https://chromestatus.com/feature/6267249280286720 at the bottom of the page.

summary: The counters-api-explorer is a great diagnostic and learning panel, but fails compliance due to a missing ChromeStatus link in the references footer.
